title: Apex Trader Funding 80% OFF

seo_content:
Apex Trader Funding: US Futures Prop Firm Since 2021

Apex Trader Funding is a futures prop trading firm based in the United States, established in January 2021. Focused exclusively on the futures market, Apex built a reputation for aggressive discount pricing and a straightforward 1-step evaluation model. The firm is known for running frequent promotions that reduce evaluation fees by up to 80% from standard prices.

Apex offers a single 1-step evaluation structure across ten account configurations ranging from $25,000 to $300,000. During promotional periods, fees drop dramatically: a $300K account costs $79.40 (standard $397), a $150K account costs $79.40 (standard $397), a $100K account costs $59.40 (standard $297), a $50K account costs $39.40 (standard $197), and a $25K account costs $37.40 (standard $187). Accounts are available on both Rithmic and Tradovate infrastructure.

The platform roster is among the most extensive in the futures prop space, including Tradovate, Rithmic, R Trader Pro, TradingView, Quantower, NinjaTrader, Sierra Chart, ATAS Orderflow Trading, Bookmap, EdgeProX, Finamark, Jigsaw Daytradr, MotiveWave, VolFix, and WealthCharts. Trading is restricted to Futures instruments only. News trading is allowed under the One-Direction rule (either long or short during news, not both simultaneously). Expert advisors are not permitted; Apex is designed for manual skill-based trading.

The payout structure rewards traders with 100% of the first $25K in profits, then 90% thereafter. A minimum payout of $500 applies across all account sizes. Payouts require 8 trading days with at least 5 days showing $50 or more in profit. A safety net applies for the first 3 payouts, adding a $100 buffer above the drawdown limit. Payout methods include ACH and Plane.

Apex Trader Funding attracts traders who prioritize value: the combination of industry-leading discounts, 100% profit split on the first $25K, and a wide platform ecosystem makes it one of the most popular futures prop firms globally. All positions must be closed by 4:10 PM EST; weekend holding is not permitted. Copy trading is allowed across personally owned PA accounts.
